# Accessibility Skill

## Auto-Load When

- building UI, forms, navigation, modals, accordions, or interactive content

## Rules

- semantic HTML before ARIA
- all controls need accessible names
- keyboard navigation must be complete
- focus must remain visible
- color contrast must remain readable
- motion must respect reduced-motion preferences

## Checklist

- heading order is logical
- labels exist for form fields
- focus states visible
- tab order sensible
- status and error messages announced or visible
- interactive elements are not `div` or `span` placeholders

## Best Practices

- test without a mouse
- prefer native input, button, dialog, and list semantics
- write microcopy that is understandable out of context
